title: Mr K George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Mr K George is honoured to...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Mr K George is honoured to be nominated for Best Gold/Precious Metal Trader in the 2025 Best of George Awards, and it’s all thanks to the ongoing support of our valued clients and the wider George community.

Based at Outeniqua Lifestyle Centre, Mr K George is more than just a gold trader. We pride ourselves on offering trust, fairness and exceptional service in every transaction, whether you are buying, selling, or simply seeking expert advice.


> What sets us apart?


- We pay top prices that are fair, transparent and competitive.
- We are trusted for our expertise, honesty knowledge and reliable service.
- We guarantee safe, discreet transactions, with privacy and peace of mind.
- We are a local focus, proudly rooted in George and committed to its future.
- Our client-first approach shows that, to us, every client matters.

We are passionate about our work, but even more about the people we serve.

If you believe we’ve earned your trust, we’d be grateful for your vote. Vote Mr K George, for gold with heart and integrity.

Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

Outeniqua Lifestyle Centre, George 044 868 0665 | www.mrk.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
